Fully automated — the scanner places entries, settles them at market close, and updates P&L, hit rate and bankroll on its own. No input needed.

CATEGORY FORM (LEARNED)
{{ b.name }} ×{{ b.mult }}
{{ candCount }} positions re-scored every 5 seconds. A $25 bet fires the moment all 6 gates pass: settles in 5–60 min, 55–92¢ favorite band, 24h volume ≥ $100, net edge ≥ +2.5¢ after Kalshi fees (~7% × p × (1−p) per contract), composite score ≥ 60 (win odds × income × category form), and not already holding the market. No position caps — every qualified edge is taken.
HIT RATE BY CATEGORY

{{ livePnlTodayLabel }}
Requires the api/trade.js function deployed with KALSHI_ACCESS_KEY, KALSHI_PRIVATE_KEY and TRADE_SECRET env vars set on Vercel. Orders are $25 limit-at-ask, signed server-side; your key never touches the browser.

Paste the real markets you see on kalshi.com, one per line:
Market question | YES price in ¢ | category | minutes to close (≤60)
{{ dataNote }} Settlement uses real Kalshi results when the feed provides them (✓ in the log), with odds-based simulation as fallback. Paper trading only — not financial advice.
